mapper.select: SELECT A.REQUST_ID , A.OCCRRNC_DE , A.SVC_NM , A.METHOD_NM , A.PROCESS_SE_CODE , C.CODE_NM AS PROCESS_SE_CODE_NM , A.PROCESS_TIME , A.RQESTER_IP , A.RQESTER_ID , B.USER_NM AS RQESTER_NM FROM TB_SYS_LOG A LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER B ON A.RQESTER_ID = B.ESNTL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE C ON A.PROCESS_SE_CODE = C.CODE WHERE C.CODE_ID = 'COM033' AND A.REQUST_ID = #{requstId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SYS_LOG_SUMMARY SELECT to_char(B.CREAT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS OCCRRNC_DE , 'Member-login' AS SVC_NM , 'actionLogin' AS METHOD_NM , SUM(CASE WHEN B.CONECT_MTHD = 'I' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CREAT_CO , SUM(CASE WHEN B.CONECT_MTHD = 'U' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UPDT_CO , SUM(CASE WHEN B.CONECT_MTHD = 'R' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS RDCNT , SUM(CASE WHEN B.CONECT_MTHD = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DELETE_CO , 0 AS OUTPT_CO , 0 AS ERROR_CO FROM TB_LOGIN_LOG B WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT C.OCCRRNC_DE FROM TB_SYS_LOG_SUMMARY C WHERE C.OCCRRNC_DE = to_char(NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYYMMDD') ) AND to_char(B.CREAT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = to_char(NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY OCCRRNC_DE , B.CONECT_MTHD
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_LOGIN_LOG WHERE to_char(CREAT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < to_char(NOW() - INTERVAL '210 days', 'YYYYMMDD')
